description: Composition Red and white striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves, buttoned chest placket, branding appliquéd on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Vintage styling on this classic polo T-shirt is a sure fire way of upping your style statement in your off-duty ensembles. This tee from locomotive is crafted from soft cotton to offer exemplary comfort which, along with its fashionable styling, makes this a great addition to your wardrobe. Pair it with form fitting denims and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
